result.summary: There are a few layout issues on this page, mainly clipped content on the right side and the bottom navigation overlapping the game grid.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar overlays the lower game cards, obscuring part of the content and making the page feel cut off.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the main content so it sits above the fixed footer, or make the footer non-overlapping.

issues.description: Several horizontal rows are clipped on the right edge, including the top category chips and the game tiles, indicating overflow beyond the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Constrain the carousel/grid widths to the screen and ensure horizontal scrolling or proper wrapping so cards are fully visible.

issues.description: Some text labels are truncated, such as 'Hot Ga...' in the top navigation, which makes the label look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Allow the tab to shrink properly, wrap the label, or reduce spacing so the full text is visible.
